changeSet.author: Ritense
changeSet.sql: UPDATE permission SET resource_type = replace(resource_type, 'com.ritense.resource.authorization.ResourcePermission', 'com.ritense.documentenapi.authorization.ZgwDocument'), conditions = replace(conditions, 'com.ritense.resource.authorization.ResourcePermission', 'com.ritense.documentenapi.authorization.ZgwDocument'), context_resource_type = replace(context_resource_type, 'com.ritense.resource.authorization.ResourcePermission', 'com.ritense.documentenapi.authorization.ZgwDocument'), context_conditions = replace(context_conditions, 'com.ritense.resource.authorization.ResourcePermission', 'com.ritense.documentenapi.authorization.ZgwDocument')

changeSet.author: Ritense
changeSet.sql: UPDATE permission SET resource_type = replace(resource_type, 'com.ritense.resource.authorization.ResourcePermission', 'com.ritense.documentenapi.authorization.ZgwDocument'), conditions = replace(conditions::text, 'com.ritense.resource.authorization.ResourcePermission', 'com.ritense.documentenapi.authorization.ZgwDocument')::json, context_resource_type = replace(context_resource_type, 'com.ritense.resource.authorization.ResourcePermission', 'com.ritense.documentenapi.authorization.ZgwDocument'), context_conditions = replace(context_conditions::text, 'com.ritense.resource.authorization.ResourcePermission', 'com.ritense.documentenapi.authorization.ZgwDocument')::json
